features.name: clog2 in void function called from always_comb
features.description: Code should include a $clog2 call inside a void function that is invoked directly by an always_comb block (not wrapped in begin/end)
features.snippet:
function void fun; $clog2(1); endfunction
always_comb fun;

features.name: always_comb with function call referencing scope
features.description: Code should include always_comb directly calling a function (without begin/end wrapper) where the function contains a system task
features.snippet:
function void fun; $clog2(1); endfunction
always_comb fun;
